question: What brand name appears in white letters on the tall vertical red sign seen on the left side of the road? A. STAGE B. ZIPPO C. TOKYO DRIFT D. YouTube
What number is displayed on the black wall structure visible on the left side as the tram approaches the building?
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Passengers sit inside a moving open-air tram vehicle facing forward toward the scenery. A large military-style armored vehicle with camouflage paint is parked stationary on the left side of the road initially. A white and blue tram drives on the road to the right. A large black building facade labeled 55 STAGE appears on the left alongside a red banner for The Fast and the Furious Tokyo Drift.

Describe the sequence of major vehicles and building signs visible as the camera vehicle moves forward from the start to the end of the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a large beige armored vehicle is parked on the left; at 6s, vertical signs for ZIPPO and Chinese cuisine appear; at 10s, a white tram drives on the right near a structure labeled 55; at 12s, a red banner reading The Fast and the Furious hangs beside a black wall marked 55 STAGE.

question: What happens to the two parked cars as smoke rises between them?
canonical_answer: Both cars are launched into the air by a massive explosion with fireball and smoke.
